title: Elbaf’s History Darkens
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #7, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's 10 kills in a row for my prized rifle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no time!!! We're being swarmed by notorious pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up, fellas! They've got shaky here, along with a bunch of treasure, not to mention Devil fruits!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ain't no point in us Killin' each other over this stuff yet!! We've gotta work together for now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll divvy up the booty once we're back!! And there better not be any Bellyachin', got it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The answer's obvious, isn't it? She'll fall for whoever saves her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Damn right. I'm not backing down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah, Shaky's gonna fall for whoever hauls in the most treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: suit yourselves. I'm just here to save a friend.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That said... if she does fall for me, I wouldn't complain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?! How could you say that, newgate?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: @THOKJ didn't even leave the island: she'll probably ban him from the bar!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How stupid can you get?! Heaven and earth could flip...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and shaky still wouldn't give any of you losers the time of day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey Linlin... you're gonna save one of those devil fruits for me, right?

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
